content.en:
After Black Wind Mountain seized the Void Dark Realm, it began to transform the Void Dark Realm, cultivating the Void Dark Realm into a Heavenly King cultivation base in Black Wind Mountain, and some outstanding True Ancestors could also enter the Void Dark Realm for cultivation.

At this time.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace had already known that Black Wind Mountain had seized a medium-sized forbidden void realm, and the three palace masters of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, as well as many emperors, were very angry.

However, they did not make any moves.

After all, the medium-sized forbidden void realm has been seized, this is already a fact, and there is no way to change it.

With the strength of Black Wind Mountain, once they controlled the medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm, their Heavenly Emperor Palace would not be able to recapture the Forbidden Void Realm.

But the Heavenly Emperor Palace is eyeing the Dark King, after all, the strength shown by the Dark King this time is too strong, once such a supreme Dao Ancestor enters the Invincible Dao Ancestor level, and even accumulates some years at the Invincible Dao Ancestor level, I am afraid that he will also be invincible at the Invincible Dao Ancestor level, and even be able to compete with the weaker half-step domain ancestor.

this day.

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord, True Martial Palace Lord, and White Tiger Palace Lord of the Heavenly Emperor Palace were discussing the matter of the Dark King.

"What's the situation with the Dark King of Black Wind Mountain, he has mastered two forbidden Dao techniques, and whether it is the power of the body, the forbidden Dao or the soul, they have all reached a very terrifying level, if it weren't for his Dao not reaching the level of the Invincible Dao Ancestor, I'm afraid I would think that he is already an Invincible Dao Ancestor!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord said angrily.

"It should be a supreme Dao Ancestor secretly cultivated by Black Wind Mountain, and it has never been exposed. We don't know how many Supreme Dao Ancestors there are in Black Wind Mountain, it's normal for a Dark King to pop up!" the True Martial Palace Master guessed.

"But this Dark King is inevitably too powerful, such a potential Supreme Dao Ancestor, once he becomes an invincible Dao Ancestor, it will be a big disaster!"

The White Tiger Palace Lord said coldly.

"If it weren't for the fact that everyone is an alliance now, otherwise I would like to kill this Dark King with my own hands, as well as the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor of the Human Race, and also a supreme Dao Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain, the potential is also very good, and there is also a chance to threaten me in the future, and it is also one of the must-kill lists of my Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

The True Martial Palace Lord said with a smile: "How long will it take for them to grow to our level?Besides, once the Forbidden Realm is born, we will have the opportunity to be promoted to the Domain Ancestor, and at that time, the Dark King will also have it, and the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors will all be ants." Moreover, on the day when the Forbidden Dao was born, it was a question of whether they could be promoted to Invincible Dao Ancestors. If you want to cultivate your Dao to the extreme, it is not a matter of high talent to be promoted to an invincible Dao Ancestor, it will take a long time, and the stronger your Dao is, the more difficult it is to be promoted to an invincible Dao Ancestor! Our Yan Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace is a hidden danger of injury, and he can't be promoted, so he won't mention it, but the defensive Dao of the Xuan Protector Dao Ancestor is too strong, which has led to the fact that he has not been promoted to the extreme, and he is always almost able to be promoted to the Invincible Dao Ancestor. That Dark King's Dao is so powerful, although it is because of the Forbidden Dao, but the Dao he himself walks is estimated to be stronger than the Dao of the Xuanhu Dao Ancestor, how difficult is it for such a Dao to be promoted to the extreme?"

"That's right!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord and the White Tiger Palace Lord nodded one after another.

"Forget about this matter, just as if they won a game in Black Wind Mountain!" said the Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace: "In the future, there will definitely be more Forbidden Void Realms, and even large Forbidden Void Realms." The strongest level in our Heavenly Emperor Palace is the Invincible Dao Ancestor, if it weren't for restricting the participation of the Invincible Dao Ancestor this time, they wouldn't have such a bargain to pick up in Black Wind Mountain!"

The True Martial Palace Lord and the White Tiger Palace Lord also agreed with this statement very much, and if they had mastered the medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm, they could not quickly improve their strength, it was just equivalent to having a base that could not be breached.

Therefore, Black Wind Mountain could not threaten the status of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

......

Nine Rivers Base.

Ye Tian came to Ouyang Jiu'er's mansion again and returned the town boundary monument to Ouyang Jiu'er.

"That's right, your strength actually surpasses Yan Zu and them!"

Ouyang Jiu'er commented.

Once, when she first met Ye Tian, Ye Tian at that time was not a powerful existence, although the talent was very good, but there was nothing that shocked her.

After all, she used to be a half-step domain ancestor, and she didn't know how many geniuses she had seen in the Divine Heaven Realm.

But now, Ye Tian defeated Yan Ancestor and Xuanhu Dao Ancestor at the level of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, and he suppressed five Supreme Dao Ancestors of this level by himself, and his combat power was already terrifying to a certain extent, even in the entire Divine Heaven Realm, such a Supreme Dao Ancestor was very rare.

Only the top few legendary-level forces in the Divine Heaven Realm could cultivate such a supreme Dao Ancestor.

Moreover, she knew very well that Ye Tian had not yet reached the limit at the level of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, and he could continue to improve.

Once Ye Tian reaches the extreme of the strongest Dao Ancestor, his combat power may be unpredictable, and he may have the ability to leapfrog and kill the invincible Dao Ancestor.

"Jiu'er, don't praise me, in terms of strength, you are not necessarily worse than me, maybe even stronger than me!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Ouyang Jiu'er had white eyes, she was the reincarnation of a half-step domain ancestor, and she had mastered more than one or two forbidden dao techniques, and her forbidden dao attainments and forbidden dao skills were very high, in this case, her combat effectiveness was naturally not weak.

But she knew very well that her foundation was about to be exhausted, and once she entered the Invincible Dao Ancestor level, the foundation of her previous life would not be of much help.

Once that time comes, it will be easy for Ye Tian to surpass her.

After the two chatted for a while, Ye Tiancai left Ouyang Jiu'er's mansion.

In the following days, Ye Tian occasionally hunted the Forbidden Zerg and occasionally entered the Void Dark Realm to cultivate.

However, he did not move some Dao Ancestors of the Nine Extremes Legion and the Human Race to the Void Dark Realm, after all, his cultivation had not reached the level of the strongest Dao Ancestor, and if he cultivated in the Small Forbidden Void Realm, the effect would be better, after all, because of the passage of time.

But once they reached the Supreme Dao Ancestor level, the small Forbidden Void Realm could not enter, and only the Medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm was the most suitable for them.

Other than that.

Ye Tian controlled half of the authority of the Void Dark Realm, and he could even mobilize a small part of the origin of the Void Dark Realm to refine his physical body and accelerate his cultivation, which was also one of the permissions of being a medium-sized forbidden Void Realm Lord.

Of course, he didn't dare to wantonly consume the origin of the Void Dark Realm, otherwise it would have a great impact on the Void Dark Realm.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, 10,000 years passed.
